div1.entryFree:
Flag, subst. 1) banner, standard: John II, 207. R3 IV, 4, 89. Rom. V, 3, 96. Ant. III, 13, 11.
2) an ensign by which signs are made: the bloody f. H5 I, 2, 101. set up the bloody f. against all patience, Cor. II, 1, 84. by the semblance of their white --s they bring us peace, Per. I, 4, 72. f. of truce, H6A III, 1, 138. a f. and sign of love, Oth. I, 1, 157.
3) the water-plant Iris: Ant. I, 4, 45.
